prompt: I need to make an infographic about Bishop AI's top 5 client results. What colors and fonts should I use, and can you give me the exact hex codes and font names so I can pass them into my design tool?

assertions.name: includes_all_main_hex_codes
assertions.description: Response includes hex codes for all 5 main colors (#000814, #1E2333, #E6E2DE, #F9F6F0, #FAFBFA)

assertions.name: includes_accent_hex_codes
assertions.description: Response includes hex codes for both accent colors (#E0B848 Gold and #1894C9 Blue)

assertions.name: names_all_three_fonts
assertions.description: Response names Poppins, Montserrat, and Open Sans

assertions.name: maps_fonts_to_roles
assertions.description: Response maps each font to its correct role (Poppins=headings, Montserrat=subheadings, Open Sans=body)

assertions.name: mentions_fallback_fonts
assertions.description: Response mentions fallback fonts (Arial, Helvetica, or Georgia)

assertions.name: actionable_for_design_tool
assertions.description: Output is structured/formatted in a way that could be directly referenced in a design tool
